scenario: DRIFT-198-I003-002 — evidence recorded for digest A must NOT be injected (fully OR partially) into a review of digest B; a partial/mismatched injection is surfaced honestly, never as clean or as proof the A-runs did not occur.
note: Field names mirror the on-disk shapes: run record = .specrew/review/inline/<run_id>/status.json (reviewed_digest_tree_id, baseline_ref); evidence = .specrew/review/test-evidence/<digest>.json (T018 recorded-run). Contract predicate under test is PURE digest identity — no runtime path is exercised.

cases.name: full-mismatch-injection-refused
cases.why: the evidence digest (A) does not equal the reviewed digest (B); the A-record is neither fully nor partially injected.

cases.name: partial-subset-injection-surfaced-as-mismatch
cases.why: even a SUBSET of the A-record injected for a B review is a mismatch; it is surfaced honestly, never presented as clean and never as proof the A-runs did not occur.

cases.name: exact-digest-injection-allowed
cases.why: the evidence digest equals the reviewed digest — the ONLY case where the record gains runner-observed standing for that tree.
